---
title: "Pagoda pathway analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-10"
---

Liver dataset
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyr)
set.seed(1234)

liver_data = readRDS("C:/Dev/Code/xGATE/Paper_code/human liver hepatocyte cells.rds")
head(liver_data@meta.data)
metadata = liver_data@meta.data

hepatocyte_cells = metadata[metadata$cell_type == "hepatocyte",]

count_matrix <- liver_data@assays[["RNA"]]@counts

liver_count_matrix = count_matrix[, rownames(hepatocyte_cells)]


```



Pagoda on hepatocytes
```{r}
library(pagoda2)
library(jsonlite)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(Matrix)
library(Seurat)



# Define the specific pathways you want to test
target_pathways <- c(
  "Carbon metabolism", "Biosynthesis of amino acids", "Biosynthesis of cofactors",
  "Glycolysis / Gluconeogenesis", "Pentose and glucuronate interconversions",
  "Ascorbate and aldarate metabolism", "Pyruvate metabolism", "Fatty acid degradation",
  "Primary bile acid biosynthesis", "Steroid hormone biosynthesis",
  "Arachidonic acid metabolism", "Linoleic acid metabolism",
  "Biosynthesis of unsaturated fatty acids", "Glycine, serine and threonine metabolism",
  "Cysteine and methionine metabolism", "Tyrosine metabolism",
  "Taurine and hypotaurine metabolism", "Retinol metabolism",
  "Porphyrin metabolism", "Metabolism of xenobiotics by cytochrome P450",
  "Cholesterol metabolism", "Caffeine metabolism", "Drug metabolism", "Thyroid cancer",
  "Shigellosis", "Colorectal cancer", "Pancreatic cancer", "Hepatocellular carcinoma",
  "Gastric cancer", "Glioma", "Acute myeloid leukemia", "Chronic myeloid leukemia",
  "Basal cell carcinoma", "Melanoma", "Renal cell carcinoma", "Bladder cancer",
  "Prostate cancer", "Endometrial cancer", "Breast cancer",
  "Small cell lung cancer", "Non-small cell lung cancer"
)

# --- 3. Prepare the Pathway Environment ---

# Load the Master JSON file
json_data <- fromJSON("C:/Dev/Code/xGATE/Paper_code/R_code/pathway_genes_master_list.json")

# Filter JSON to keep only the requested pathways
valid_targets <- intersect(names(json_data), target_pathways)
filtered_list <- json_data[valid_targets]
print(paste("Processing", length(valid_targets), "pathways..."))

# Helper Function: Convert IDs and Clean Attributes
clean_and_convert <- function(kegg_ids) {
  # 1. Remove "hsa:" prefix
  entrez_ids <- gsub("hsa:", "", kegg_ids)
  
  # 2. Map Entrez to Ensembl
  ensembl_ids <- mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db, 
                        keys = entrez_ids, 
                        column = "ENSEMBL", 
                        keytype = "ENTREZID", 
                        multiVals = "first")
  
  # 3. Remove NAs
  clean_ids <- na.omit(ensembl_ids)
  
  # 4. CRITICAL: Strip all attributes (names, na.action) to prevent 'non-function' error
  clean_ids <- as.vector(clean_ids)
  clean_ids <- unname(clean_ids)
  attributes(clean_ids) <- NULL 
  
  return(clean_ids)
}

# Apply conversion and cleaning
final_list <- lapply(filtered_list, clean_and_convert)

# Remove any empty pathways
final_list <- final_list[sapply(final_list, length) > 0]

# Convert to R Environment (Required for 'testPathwayOverdispersion')
pathway_env <- list2env(final_list)


# --- 4. Initialize PAGODA2 Object ---

# Ensure matrix is strictly a sparse matrix (dgCMatrix) to avoid Type errors
# Also check for versioned IDs in the matrix (e.g. ENSG...1) and strip them if needed
clean_counts <- as(as.matrix(liver_count_matrix), "dgCMatrix")
if(any(grepl("\\.[0-9]+$", rownames(clean_counts)))) {
  rownames(clean_counts) <- sub("\\.[0-9]+$", "", rownames(clean_counts))
}

set.seed(1234)
# Create PAGODA2 object 
p2 <- Pagoda2$new(clean_counts, log.scale=TRUE, n.cores=1)

# Run Preprocessing
p2$adjustVariance(plot=FALSE, gam.k=10)
p2$calculatePcaReduction(nPcs=50, n.odgenes=3000)


# --- 5. Run Pathway Analysis ---
set.seed(1234)

# Use 'testPathwayOverdispersion' (Robust method for Environments)
# min.pathway.size = 5 filters out pathways with too few matching genes
p2$testPathwayOverdispersion(setenv = pathway_env, verbose = TRUE, 
                             recalculate.pca = FALSE, min.pathway.size = 5)


# --- 6. Extract Results (Significance & Activity) ---

# A. Get Significance Table (Z-scores)
sig_results <- data.frame(Pathway = names(final_list), Z_Score = NA, NumGenes = NA)

for(pw in names(final_list)) {
  if(!is.null(p2$misc$pwpca[[pw]])) {
    res <- p2$misc$pwpca[[pw]]
    # Use Z-score if available, otherwise raw variance
    sig_results$Z_Score[sig_results$Pathway == pw] <- if(!is.null(res$z)) res$z else res$zv
    sig_results$NumGenes[sig_results$Pathway == pw] <- length(res$xp$rotation[,1])
  }
}
# Sort by significance
sig_results <- sig_results[order(sig_results$Z_Score, decreasing = TRUE), ]
print("Top Significant Pathways:")
print(head(sig_results, 10))



```

Load Pancreas dataset
```{r}
library(pagoda2)
library(jsonlite)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(Matrix)
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)

# Define target pathways
target_pathways <- c(
  "Autophagy",
    "Protein processing in endoplasmic reticulum",
    "mTOR signaling pathway",
    "MAPK signaling pathway",
    "Apoptosis",
    "Longevity regulating pathway",
    "HIF-1 signaling pathway",
    "AMPK signaling pathway",
    "Phagosome",
    "PPAR signaling pathway",
    "FoxO signaling pathway",
    "cGMP-PKG signaling pathway",
    "Cytokine-cytokine receptor interaction",
    "Mineral absorption",
    "Antigen processing and presentation",
    "Rap1 signaling pathway",
    "Ribosome",
    "Protein digestion and absorption",
    "PI3K-Akt signaling pathway",
    "Insulin signaling pathway",
    "Oxidative phosphorylation",
    "Pancreatic secretion",
    "Salmonella infection",
    "Bacterial invasion of epithelial cells",
    "Pathogenic Escherichia coli infection",
    "Thyroid cancer",
    "Shigellosis"
)

# Load and Clean JSON Pathways
json_data <- fromJSON("C:/Dev/Code/xGATE/Paper_code/R_code/pathway_genes_master_list.json")
filtered_list <- json_data[intersect(names(json_data), target_pathways)]

# Helper to clean IDs
clean_and_convert <- function(kegg_ids) {
  entrez_ids <- gsub("hsa:", "", kegg_ids)
  ensembl_ids <- mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db, keys = entrez_ids, column = "ENSEMBL", keytype = "ENTREZID", multiVals = "first")
  clean_ids <- na.omit(ensembl_ids)
  clean_ids <- as.vector(clean_ids) # Strip attributes
  clean_ids <- unname(clean_ids)
  attributes(clean_ids) <- NULL 
  return(clean_ids)
}

final_list <- lapply(filtered_list, clean_and_convert)
final_list <- final_list[sapply(final_list, length) > 0]
pathway_env <- list2env(final_list) # Ready for PAGODA


# --- 2. CONTROL GROUP ANALYSIS ---

# Load Data
pancreas_data <- readRDS("C:/Dev/Code/xGATE/Paper_code/pancreas_human.rds")
metadata <- pancreas_data@meta.data

# Subset Control Beta Cells
cells_ctrl <- rownames(metadata[metadata$cell_type == "type B pancreatic cell" & 
                                metadata$disease_state == "Control",])
count_matrix_ctrl <- pancreas_data@assays[["RNA"]]@counts[, cells_ctrl]

# Prepare Matrix
clean_counts_ctrl <- as(as.matrix(count_matrix_ctrl), "dgCMatrix")
if(any(grepl("\\.[0-9]+$", rownames(clean_counts_ctrl)))) {
  rownames(clean_counts_ctrl) <- sub("\\.[0-9]+$", "", rownames(clean_counts_ctrl))
}

# Run PAGODA (Control)
set.seed(1234) # Reproducibility for PCA
p2_ctrl <- Pagoda2$new(clean_counts_ctrl, log.scale=TRUE, n.cores=1)
p2_ctrl$adjustVariance(plot=FALSE, gam.k=10)
p2_ctrl$calculatePcaReduction(nPcs=50, n.odgenes=3000)

set.seed(1234) # Reproducibility for Z-scores
p2_ctrl$testPathwayOverdispersion(setenv = pathway_env, verbose = TRUE, 
                                  recalculate.pca = FALSE, min.pathway.size = 5)

# Extract Results
results_ctrl <- data.frame(Pathway = names(final_list), Z_Score = NA)
for(pw in names(final_list)) {
  if(!is.null(p2_ctrl$misc$pwpca[[pw]])) {
    res <- p2_ctrl$misc$pwpca[[pw]]
    results_ctrl$Z_Score[results_ctrl$Pathway == pw] <- if(!is.null(res$z)) res$z else res$zv
  }
}
results_ctrl <- results_ctrl[order(results_ctrl$Z_Score, decreasing = TRUE), ]

print("Top Significant Pathways (Control Beta Cells):")
print(head(results_ctrl, 10))


```

T1d Group Results
```{r}
# --- 3. T1D GROUP ANALYSIS ---

# Subset T1D Beta Cells
# Note: Using 'disease' column per your snippet
cells_t1d <- rownames(metadata[metadata$cell_type == "type B pancreatic cell" & 
                               metadata$disease == "type 1 diabetes mellitus",])
count_matrix_t1d <- pancreas_data@assays[["RNA"]]@counts[, cells_t1d]

# Prepare Matrix
clean_counts_t1d <- as(as.matrix(count_matrix_t1d), "dgCMatrix")
if(any(grepl("\\.[0-9]+$", rownames(clean_counts_t1d)))) {
  rownames(clean_counts_t1d) <- sub("\\.[0-9]+$", "", rownames(clean_counts_t1d))
}

# Run PAGODA (T1D)
set.seed(1234) # Same seed as Control for fair comparison
p2_t1d <- Pagoda2$new(clean_counts_t1d, log.scale=TRUE, n.cores=1)
p2_t1d$adjustVariance(plot=FALSE, gam.k=10)
p2_t1d$calculatePcaReduction(nPcs=50, n.odgenes=3000)

set.seed(1234) 
p2_t1d$testPathwayOverdispersion(setenv = pathway_env, verbose = TRUE, 
                                 recalculate.pca = FALSE, min.pathway.size = 5)

# Extract Results
results_t1d <- data.frame(Pathway = names(final_list), Z_Score = NA)
for(pw in names(final_list)) {
  if(!is.null(p2_t1d$misc$pwpca[[pw]])) {
    res <- p2_t1d$misc$pwpca[[pw]]
    results_t1d$Z_Score[results_t1d$Pathway == pw] <- if(!is.null(res$z)) res$z else res$zv
  }
}
results_t1d <- results_t1d[order(results_t1d$Z_Score, decreasing = TRUE), ]

print("Top Significant Pathways (T1D Beta Cells):")
print(head(results_t1d, 10))




```
